content:
INDEPENDENT AUDiTOR’S REPORT
AND
FiNANCiAL STATEMENTS
30 JUNE 2023
DEVELOPMENT BANK OF ETHIOPIA
Your Development partner!

INDEPENDENT AUDiTOR’S REPORT
AND
FiNANCiAL STATEMENTS
30 JUNE 2023
DEVELOPMENT BANK OF ETHIOPIA
Your Development partner!

The image features a black and white poster promoting a financial statement for the month of June 2021. The poster is covered with green and white colors, making the title "Independent Auditor's Report and Financial statements" stand out at the top. The date "30 June 2023" is displayed at the bottom of the poster, indicating the month and year being featured. The poster seems to be made for an educational purpose, and the message is primarily in black letters. It lacks any accompanying images, but the use of green and white color scheme makes the subject matter easily noticeable and appealing to the audience.

The document appears to be an account book or summary file about the operations of a local or national bank's auditor or auditor of company. This document contains statements about the development bank of Kenya, the local and international auditing standards and the financial statements for the year 2014. The content of the document seems to be well organized, making it an informative piece of paperwork. The document is neatly handwritten and features a logo that may be found on bank merchandise or official documents as a sign of authenticity.

The image shows a report titled "Annual report: Commercial banks of Ethiopia". The report was done in the year "2023/24", but the specific year is not clearly marked. This report, a part of a report book, seems to be a significant financial document produced by a bank in its home country. A report book contains financial reports and forecasts of its home country's financial situation, which can include details about the banking system, credit ratings, bank equity and reserves, and other monetary and financial indicators.

The image shows a book or flyer for Digital Banking Forward. It has a striking design featuring a cityscape with buildings and a bridge over water. There is the company's name above the skyline, highlighting their digital banking solution. The background also includes a cell phone with a wallet attached to it. This design is intended to attract attention and reflect the modern financial trends of the modern world. The cover's purple background complements the blue sky, adding to the overall aesthetic.

The image features a page from a press release. The cover of the press release is predominantly green with black lettering, and it displays the title "Indecent Auditor's Report and Financial Statements. June 2023: 30 June 2023". The press release is presented in three parts, and the first line from the press release reads: "Indecent Auditor's Report & Financial Statements. [Jun 20 23]." Below the main press release title in the top left corner, there is a summary in the middle part of the press release, and in the middle right part of the press release, a date: "30 June 2023."

The image features a report about the African Bank of Vienna's Commercial Bank of Ethiopia. The report is displayed on a poster with an eye-catching design featuring yellow, black, and pink colors and is framed by diamond shapes. The title of the report is "Annual Report", with a date of "2023/24" accompanying it.

The image features a poster showcasing digital banking and mobile phones. There are five cell phones on the poster, placed at various positions. One of the phones has a purple color and is located towards the top left corner of the image, another is slightly to the left of the central phone. To the right of each phone, there is a logo. A purple and gold logo can be seen on the central cell phone, and the center phone has a more prominent purple logo. The middle phone has a striking yellow logo.
